zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Vaughan是Sir Thomas Vaughan of Tretower, Brecknockshire的女兒，於大約1452年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾特雷度維爾。她於1501年11月25日與Edward Stanley在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1515年1月15日在英國賀福爾享年64歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾聖 馬加也斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Vaughan是Sir Thomas Vaughan of Tretower, Brecknockshire的女儿，于大约1452年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾特雷度維爾。她于1501年11月25日与Edward Stanley在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1515年1月15日在英国賀福爾享年64岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾聖 馬加也斯。

nameMeanings.name: Vaughan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

variants.name: Von
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Veon
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .

variants.name: Vaughns
meanings: Welsh: variant of Vaughan , with English patronymic -s.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Vaughan was born about 1452, in Tretower, Breconshire, Wales as the daughter of Sir Thomas Vaughan of Tretower, Brecknockshire. She married Edward Stanley on 25 November 1501, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 15 January 1515, in Herefordshire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in St Margaret's, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Vaughan est née environ 1452, à Tretower, Breconshire, Galles, fille de Sir Thomas Vaughan of Tretower, Brecknockshire. Elle a épousé Edward Stanley le 25 novembre 1501, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 janvier 1515, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à St Margaret's, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Vaughan wurde um 1452 in Tretower, Breconshire, Wales, als Tochter von Sir Thomas Vaughan of Tretower, Brecknockshire geboren. Sie hat am 25. November 1501 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Edward Stanley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Vaughan è nata il circa 1452 nel Tretower, Breconshire, Galles come figlia di Sir Thomas Vaughan of Tretower, Brecknockshire. Lei sposato Edward Stanley il 25 novembre 1501, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 15 gennaio 1515, nel Herefordshire, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a St Margaret's, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Vaughanは約1452年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアトレトウエルでSir Thomas Vaughan of Tretower, Brecknockshireの娘として生まれた。1501年11月25日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでEdward Stanleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1515年1月15日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで64歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアスト マルガーエト'スにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Vaughan(은)는 대략 1452년 웨일스 브레콘실르 트레타워에서 Sir Thomas Vaughan of Tretower, Brecknockshire의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1501년 11월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Edward Stanley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1515년 1월 15일 영국 허퍼드실르에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 스트 마가트'스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Vaughan nasceu aproximadamente 1452, em Tretower, Breconshire, Gales filha de Sir Thomas Vaughan of Tretower, Brecknockshire. Ela casou-se com Edward Stanley em 25 de novembro de 1501, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de janeiro de 1515, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em St Margaret's, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Vaughan родилась около 1452 г. в местности третоуир, брекуншир, Уэльс. Её отца звали Sir Thomas Vaughan of Tretower, Brecknockshire. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Stanley 25 ноября 1501 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 15 января 1515 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности ст маргарет'с, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Vaughan nació aproximadamente 1452, en Tretower, Breconshire, Gales como hija de Sir Thomas Vaughan of Tretower, Brecknockshire. Se casó con Edward Stanley el 25 de noviembre de 1501, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 15 de enero de 1515, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en St Margaret's, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
